elevation.$description: NEW IN V0.1 — elevation/shadow system was not in v7 docs. Candidate values pending Phase 1 validation. Designed to be SUBTLE per the cinematic-not-polished axiom.

0.$description: Flat — no shadow. Default for production register.

1.$description: Subtle — borders, inputs at rest. Cards on light backgrounds.

2.$description: Soft — raised cards, hover state on flat cards.

glow-teal.$description: Organic teal glow — cinematic register only. Use on hero elements or behind brand-mark on dark backgrounds.
